rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.20+commit.a1b79de6"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"FinalPolynomialMismatch","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"FoldingMismatch","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"InvalidFRILayer","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"InvalidMerkleProof","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"QueryOutOfRange","type":"error"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Implements the complete FRI low-degree test as described in STARK papers FRI (Fast Reed-Solomon IOPP) Protocol: 1. Prover commits to polynomial evaluations via Merkle tree 2. Verifier sends random folding challenges 3. Prover folds polynomial and commits to new evaluations 4. Repeat until polynomial is constant 5. Verifier checks consistency at random query points Security: 128-bit security requires ~80 queries with blowup factor 8 QUANTUM SHIELD COMPLIANCE: - CP-1: Uses SHA3-256 (FIPS 202) instead of keccak256 for quantum resistance - All hash operations use the SHA3_256 library","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"FRIVerifier - Level 2 FRI Low-Degree Test Implementation","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Full FRI verification for STARK proofs","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/FRIVerifier.sol":"FRIVerifier"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":@qs/=src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":lib/openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/FRIVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xeb3ced3dc39611de3617a2d3fe7f025084a6918d07455b2021c0e5108f24100e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b1ba9df431a9ffe6c2922d962ef1dc4224dfb3e3690f2297867c3df05daa1cdc","dweb:/ipfs/QmatF7emqanXkjasjeZZs3H5mRJgsoajNBbFdwdyuh9ePC"]},"src/libraries/SHA3_256.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4a91b97f090dabd9bec99f4a4367c1ca9ca9c066a676584a3832acd83a20da22","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://91a1786a4b81a30cbff4c625fc7cd81b5cb2f24dd40019772d4e07ab8c04d3e6","dweb:/ipfs/QmaKLegGzXatmd48Y4sMvxHiHWqCr9mrw6fnLREQAWAmib"]}},"version":1}
